summary: Resettable Device Identifier (rdid) Parameter to DAI - Live Game
description:
GIVEN a user is entitled for Live game playback

*NOTE:*
Launch the app in the browser, open the Network tab in DevTools (filter 'streams'), start a video

steps.action: WHEN a user initiates playback of a live game
steps.result: THEN parameter {{rdid}} is passed for users in UUID format
